commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And two divisions of all you that go forth on the sabbath, even they shall keep the watch of the house of the LORD about the king. Levites, who waited on the king's person alternately. (Calmet) They were divided into three parts, being in actual service, ver. Those who went out of office were twice the number, and are here told what to do. Sa thinks that those who entered upon duty, and those who went out, formed two thirds of the Levites, ver. , and 2 Paralipomenon xxiii. (Menochius).
